meta.agenda: Review last month's performance: spend, ROAS, CPA, and conversion trends across all campaigns. Identify top-performing and underperforming campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and ads. Discuss budget pacing, recent changes made, and recommended actions for next month.

pre_answered_qa.q: How much did we spend?
What is our ROAS?
pre_answered_qa.a: Blended ROAS for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026: 2.81x. Down 0.32x vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our CPA?
pre_answered_qa.a: Average CPA: $219.02 for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. Increased $21.96 vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026.

pre_answered_qa.q: How many conversions did we get?
pre_answered_qa.a: 9,918 conversions generating $6,104,364.33 conversion value for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. Down 16.6% vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026.

pre_answered_qa.q: How many impressions did we get?
pre_answered_qa.a: 32,806,626 impressions in Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026 at 1.29% CTR. Impressions down 13.8% vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our Search Impression Share?
pre_answered_qa.a: Account-wide Search IS: 0.4% for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. Best campaign: [Search] Bags - Backpacks/Drawstring [MOB] at 0.1% IS.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which campaign is performing best?
pre_answered_qa.a: [Search] Bags - Backpacks/Drawstring [MOB] leads with 9.71x ROAS, 2.0 conversions, $136.19 spend, and 0.1% IS.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which campaign needs attention most?
pre_answered_qa.a: Shopping 3 - Samples | Queries: Only 0.7% IS despite strong 2.79x ROAS — scale budget/bids. Spend $813639.54, ROAS 2.79x, CPA $236.29.

pre_answered_qa.q: How many campaigns are running?
pre_answered_qa.a: 34 active and 139 paused campaigns.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our monthly budget?
pre_answered_qa.a: Total daily budget: $476,820.00. Estimated monthly: $14,495,328.

pre_answered_qa.q: Are we on pace with our budget?
pre_answered_qa.a: Pacing status: Behind Pace. Period spend $2,172,178.94 vs linear target $14,304,600.00. Projected month total: $2,201,141. Utilization: 15%.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which keywords are wasting budget?
pre_answered_qa.a: 30 keywords with zero conversions spending a combined $104,960.54. Top waste: '4 allpromotion' (EXACT) — $982.26 spend, 0 conversions.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which keyword converts best?
pre_answered_qa.a: '4allpromos' (EXACT) leads with 650.2 conversions at 7.68x ROAS. IS: 1.0%.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which ad is performing best?
pre_answered_qa.a: Ad ID 705985244625 (SHOPPING_PRODUCT_AD) in All Samples: 3443.1 conversions, 2.79x ROAS, 1.5% CTR on $813639.54 spend.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which ad type drives the most results?
pre_answered_qa.a: SHOPPING_PRODUCT_AD is top with $1,590,458.58 spend, 2.7x ROAS, and 12 active ads.

pre_answered_qa.q: Are any ads underperforming?
pre_answered_qa.a: 20 ads with meaningful spend are below 1x ROAS (break-even). Example: Ad 795404725675 (RESPONSIVE_SEARCH_AD) — $922.02 spend, 0.0x ROAS.

pre_answered_qa.q: What changes were made recently?
pre_answered_qa.a: Most recent: UPDATE on AD_GROUP 'customers/6267663399/adGroups/170664452600' on 2026-04-27 by performance.prod@pixis.ai. 60 total changes in the analysis period.

pre_answered_qa.q: How did we perform vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026?
pre_answered_qa.a: Spend -7.3%, conversions -16.6%, ROAS -0.32x, CPA $+21.96.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our cost per click?
pre_answered_qa.a: Average CPC: $5.12 for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. 424,667 total clicks.

pre_answered_qa.q: How many keywords are we running?
pre_answered_qa.a: 3604 keywords had spend in Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. 658 drove conversions. 7742 had zero conversions.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which keyword match type is working best?
pre_answered_qa.a: Match type spend breakdown: EXACT: $300,817.96 spend; PHRASE: $78,455.02 spend; BROAD: $51,486.26 spend. Best by ROAS: EXACT.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which campaign drives the most conversions?
pre_answered_qa.a: Shopping 3 - Samples | Queries drove 3443.4 conversions (2.79x ROAS) on $813639.54 spend.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our total conversion value?
pre_answered_qa.a: $6,104,364.33 conversion value for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026. Down 16.6% vs Feb 27 – Mar 28, 2026.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which campaign has the highest Search Impression Share?
pre_answered_qa.a: 4AllPromos Brand - Exact at 1.0% IS (0.8% abs top IS). ROAS 5.22x.

pre_answered_qa.q: Which campaign has the lowest Impression Share?
pre_answered_qa.a: [Search] General Industry Terms [DSK] is at 0.1% IS (losing 0.9% to rank). ROAS 2.11x on $101213.7 spend.

pre_answered_qa.q: Are any ads spending without converting?
pre_answered_qa.a: 20 ads with $50+ spend have zero conversions. Top example: Ad 795404725675 (RESPONSIVE_SEARCH_AD) — $922.02 spend, 0 conversions.

pre_answered_qa.q: What bidding strategies are we using?
pre_answered_qa.a: Spend by bidding strategy: TARGET_ROAS: $1,821,493, MAXIMIZE_CONVERSION_VALUE: $215,567, TARGET_IMPRESSION_SHARE: $135,119.

pre_answered_qa.q: What is our daily average performance?
pre_answered_qa.a: Daily averages for Mar 29 – Apr 27, 2026: $72,406 spend, 331 conversions, 2.81x ROAS.
